case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1,336.00 U.S. CUR ET AL

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1,336.00 U.S. CUR DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM (15-106) (TRANSACTION ID # 58290428) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA WILLIAMS, WILLIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $734.35 U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT WILLIE WILLIAMS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $601.65 U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO THE FRANCHISE TAX BOARD PURSUANT TO THE FTB ORDER TO WITHHOLD PERSONAL INCOME TAX. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR RESPECTIVE COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
